## About P&G Manufacturing

P&G Manufacturing is all about safety, quality, and productivity. We package and palletize products ready for shipment, but this goes far beyond traditional warehousing. Our operations include state-of-the-art robotics, automation, zero-touch systems, and zero waste to landfill capabilities. Our team of analysts, engineers, leaders, and managers ensures the excellence of our 65 iconic, trusted brands throughout P&G's global end-to-end supply chain.
